name: SnackTimeActionGame
short_description: [Snackable hero experience!]Zombies in the city, a western street corner, a samurai battle... Snack time action game is a 2D action game where you can easily enjoy feeling like a hero or a monster in various situations! 7 types of situations + α&20+ playable characters! The combination is up to you!
detailed_description:
[Snackable hero experience!]

Including a city roamed by zombies, a western street corner crossed by bullets, and a samurai battle through the four seasons, there are many situations available, This game is 2D action game to enjoy feeling like a hero or a monster in a short time & easily!

There are 8 types of situations + α & 20+ playable characters!

By completing each situation, bonus characters will be unlocked, and eventually 20+ characters will be available to enjoy. Some characters have overwhelming power, so you can experience the experience of knocking down your enemies!

The combination depends on your mood!

Once you have cleared a situation, you can use all unlocked characters. Cowboys vs. Ninjas, Pirates vs. Zombies, Samurai vs. Space Monsters, Shark vs. Villains - the combination depends on your mood!

Easy difficulty!

The overall difficulty level is low so that you can enjoy the feeling of being a hero. However, enemy bosses in each situation will attack you with their own unique attacks. Watch their movements and defeat them calmly!

No difficult storyline.

Although the objective in each situation is presented, there is no storyline that interferes with the play. "Today I'm going to be a cowboy and fight pirates!" If you decide to be a that's the story!

The new situation & new character update [Dinosaur Update] has been launched! On July 31, 2025, a new situation themed around dinosaurs and new playable characters will be added!

The new situation and new character addition update [Gladiator Update] has been released!

A new situation themed around gladiators and new playable characters will be added on 2/14/2025!

Please look forward to future updates

Plans are underway to add new stages and playable characters in post-launch updates to ensure that you can enjoy the game for a long time. Stay tuned for more information!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
